name: code-agent
description: Specialized in code generation, review, debugging, and software engineering tasks.

name: data-analyst
description: Specialized in data analysis, visualization, statistical analysis, and creating insights from datasets.

name: planner-agent
description: Reads ward context and decomposes goals into structured execution plans with agent assignments, dependencies, and acceptance criteria.

name: research-agent
description: Specialized in gathering, analyzing, and synthesizing information from various sources.

name: summarizer
description: Specialized in condensing long outputs, extracting key points, and creating concise summaries from detailed content.

name: tutor-agent
description: Specialized in educational explanations, step-by-step guidance, and breaking down complex concepts into understandable pieces.

name: writing-agent
description: Specialized in content creation, editing, and written communication.
